selected_dialects.reason: Prismatic block with rectangular base body, top-face rectangular pocket/slot, corner hole pattern, and side locating holes — all expressible via extrude_rectangle, cut_rectangular_pocket, and cut_hole operations native to the sketch_extrude dialect.

safety_notes: Reference geometry only — no manufacturing or structural certification implied.
All dimensions interpreted as nominal reference values; no tolerances, GD&T, or surface finishes are encoded.
